description: Hello World #3 — uses a hydro power + spring source, force field, shallows, and sense nodes.

2003-cal-henderson.skip_reason: Does not support sense / shallows / force field

2017-addison-bean.notes: Panics with `already borrowed: BorrowMutError` on the first FishDown tick — river.rs:237's move_salmon borrows the parent mutably while the tick recursion still holds it, so any multi-level tree crashes before producing output.

2018-martijn-arts.notes: Does not support the sense / shallows / force.field nodes this program uses to gate output.

2023-james-thistlewood.notes: Correct greeting followed by a stray `homeless` salmon — an extra hatchery emission after the program's intended output.
